    Refreshes the tree view displaying open and closed admin requests.

    Renders the details of a specific admin request into the provided UI container.

    Renders the details of a specific staff request into the provided UI container.
    Reply - Class in entityClasses
    Represents a reply to a post (Discussion or Question) or another reply.

    resetPassword(String, String) - Method in class database.Database
    Resets a user's password to a new One-Time Password (OTP) and sets a 24-hour expiration.

    Resubmits an existing admin request.
